name: kgateway
description: Expert guide for kgateway, the CNCF Kubernetes Gateway API implementation powered by Envoy for routing, security, resiliency, observability, debugging, and upgrades.

interface.longDescription: Use kgateway to install and operate Envoy-backed Kubernetes Gateway API infrastructure, configure routes and policies, secure ingress, manage resilience, observe traffic, and debug upgrades.
defaultPrompt: Use kgateway to debug this HTTPRoute.
Use kgateway to configure JWT at ingress.
Use kgateway to plan a Gateway API rollout.
